transcript.text:
[Brough to you in 4D]
[A battle with garaetteok (type of rice cake)]
[1st in Tteok's Office for 12 weeks in a row]
[There's no way you won't pass out after this movie] -Tteok News, Reporter Kim
[Overwhelming emotions]
[There was a standing ovation after the movie] -Jungwon News, Reporter Park
Looks delicious
Hello everyone
I was craving some spicy rice cake
After filming a program here in the country-side
I was looking for a place
And ended up here in Cheongju
They give discounts to customers who wear purple on the last Wednesday of every month
Coincidentally, I happen to be wearing purple today
But the last Wednesday of this month is tomorrow
I should've been here tomorrow, not today

Today is Tuesday, so I won't be getting a discount
[Tteokbora, Chungcheongbuk-do, Cheongju]
[Wear purple on the last Wednesday of every month for a discount]
Hello
That looks amazing
There's a kiosk here
1 serving for 3,000 Won (~$2.65 USD)
1 line for 1,000 Won (~$0.88 USD)
So many different kinds of fried food
Hotteok (Sweet Pancake), and soda as well
Extra fishcake soup
For free
To start off,
[Breaking the machine]
20 orders
[Adding more ingredients]

That only comes out to be 24,500 Won (~$22 USD)
[1 more order of fishcake]
I just finished ordering
Their spicy rice cake comes out cut in pieces,
But I wanted the longer version
So I requested for that
They said they will also give me a big plate
Most likely on some tray
20 orders? She can't finish it
Thank you
That's big
Thank you
Over here, please
Looks yummy
Let's try the sauce first
You really can't go wrong with this sauce

Super long
Only for 1,000 Won
Delicious
I really love these rice cake
I prefer the rice over flour
Very good
Very long, right? (Fried seaweed roll)
How many is that?
That's so good
So yummy
Someone please open a spicy rice cake restaurant near my house
Soondae (Fried pork blood sausage)
It's been a long time since I had this
Halfsies
White
Sauce all over

Rice cake made with rice is the best
Why?
We use flour rice cake at my restaurant
It's a bit spicy
I will make a skewer
It's not too spicy But there's a kick to it
I've had lots of tteokboki before
This flavor is kind of like...
[Well, how is it?]
[Let me eat some more]
[Thumbs up]
The tingling taste
Something most of us had when we were kids
It's tasty
I don't think they used gochujang (Red chili pepper paste)
I think they used red chili pepper flakes

It's sweet and spicy
Excuse me, do you guys use gochujang paste? No, we don't
Thank goodness, I got it right
Let's cut this up into pieces
This scissor works very well
Excuse me, can I buy these scissors from you?
Works so well
Cutting it into small pieces will let you taste more of the sauce
Eat this on the side Enjoy your meal
This pickled radish looks very juicy
So refreshing
Is this their specialty? It's so good
[All of them watching her eat]
I thought my daughter was eating that much
[Because she's wearing purple] Yes, I'm wearing purple too
Purple Day is tomorrow though, right?

[Come back tomorrow]
I should come tomorrow
Let's eat it here
Fried shrimp
It's so big
It surprises me every time
A normal one is like 3/4th of this, no?
Like this much? No, shorter
Yes, it's about this long most of the time
It's time to eat the boiled egg
So delicious
[Finished 1 tray]
Is she going to eat everything?
Even 4 grown-up men will struggle
I was going to to-go some home because I love garaetteok
I will package these to take home

I order 10 more to eat right now while they're fresh
Chewy
Warm and fresh
It's starting to get spicy
[Spicy Rice Cake restaurant owner who can't eat spicy food]
Fishcake has been sitting here
[You want a new one?]
[I'll just eat it]
Aren't you full? I'm okay
I can't even eat 1 piece
I've had it too many times, so I'm sick of it
Don't say that!
She got scolded
I'm sure red fishcake is as good
But having the original fishcake on the side is the best with this
[New order of fried shrimp]

They're closing soon
I can't stay here for too much longer, so I only ordered 1 I'm going to make more to-go orders
[No entrance]
[Letting the shrimp cool down a bit]
[Let's try it again]
You must have this when you're here
[Fatty]
Full of meat, right?
Both calamari and seaweed are good as well
I want to order some more
I think the price is way too cheap
3 of these for 3,000 Won
That's a lot more food than what they sell on the streets
I'm starting to tear up
I'm very sad
[A wave of purple cheers]

Was that not a lot of food?
I've been craving tteokboki for a few days
I got to satisfy my cravings today
I will have to get more orders to-go because it was so good
Are there any left?
[They're listening]
That was a great meal
Thanks everyone
[We enjoyed the show] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
